response.original_title: How long does a (Robinhood) refund take?
response.overview: A Robinhood refund usually takes 5–10 business days to appear in your original payment method 💳.⇢ 888 ➲ 634 ➲ 2381 ⇠  Once the refund is processed, your bank may require additional time to post the amount to your account. ⇢ 888 ➲ 634 ➲ 2381 ⇠  You can track the refund status in your transaction history or get assistance if there’s a delay ⇢ 888 ➲ 634 ➲ 2381 ⇠ 📱. For further guidance and support regarding refund issues, you may also check updates or contact help ⇵ 888 ⇌ 634 ⇌ 2381 ⇵ ⏱️.
response.title: How long does a (Robinhood) refund take?
